name: WF: 5- Marketing Intelligence, Content & Campaign Control with CREA Validation

parameters.toolDescription: Analyzes market demand, competitors, and consumer behavior to provide market insights, opportunities, and risks
Identifies trending ingredients, content formats, and channel preferences with confidence scores
Generates raw content ideas based on content strategy
Creates visual and creative concepts based on content strategy
Writes copy and captions based on content strategy
Provides SEO keywords and optimization recommendations based on content strategy
Plans campaign channels, schedule, budget estimate, and KPIs

options.systemMessage: You are the CMO Orchestrator for a cosmetic brand. Coordinate marketing intelligence, trend analysis, content strategy, and content generation to create data-driven, brand-aligned marketing campaigns. Call tools in sequence: 1) Market Intelligence 2) Trend Analysis 3) Content Strategy 4) Content Creator, Designer, Writer, SEO Ops in parallel 5) Campaign Ops. Return structured JSON with all results. IMPORTANT: You are generating DRAFT content only. All claims require CREA validation before publishing.

assignments.name: decision_summary
assignments.value: CREA rejected claims. Campaign blocked from publishing.

assignments.name: decision_summary
assignments.value: Campaign published successfully. All gates passed: mode=execute, CREA approved, confidence >= 0.9

assignments.name: execution_note
assignments.value: Simulation mode or gates not passed - no external publishing

parameters.toolDescription: Defines content strategy including key messages, approved claims draft, tone, and channels based on market intelligence and trends

parameters.errorMessage: WORKFLOW REJECTED: Invalid or incomplete universal contract from WF-0. Required fields: request_id, mode, confidence, risk_level, payload, audit metadata.

assignments.name: decision_summary
assignments.value: Simulation mode – campaign NOT executable. Publishing blocked.

assignments.name: decision_summary
assignments.value: System confidence below 90% threshold for autonomous marketing. Human approval required.

parameters.errorMessage: CAMPAIGN BLOCKED: CREA approval required before marketing publish. No fallback. No bypass. No exceptions.

assignments.name: decision_summary
assignments.value: CREA rejection - campaign blocked. No bypass allowed.
